# CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Mode.shouldPropagate

**Case**

A mode that propagates attachments.

## Declaration

```swift
case shouldPropagate
```

## Cases

- **CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Mode.shouldNotPropagate**: A mode that doesn’t propagate attachments.
